ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gpu_models" (
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU model */,
  "gpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU model (e.g., NVIDIA H100 PCIe) */,
  "release_mode" INTEGER /* Mode of release for the GPU (e.g., production, beta) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the GPU manufacturer */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* GPU architecture (e.g., Ampere, Turing) */,
  "memory_size" REAL /* Size of the GPU memory in GB */,
  "memory_type" TEXT /* Type of GPU memory (e.g., GDDR6, HBM2) */,
  "clock_speed" INTEGER /* Clock speed of the GPU in MHz */,
  "compute_capability" REAL /* Compute capability of the GPU */,
  "power_consumption" INTEGER /* Power consumption of the GPU in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU model used in the simulation */,
  "model" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm model used in the simulation */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps in the simulation */,
  "agent_count" INTEGER /* Count of agents involved in the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_gpu_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_id") REFERENCES gpu_models ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the simulation parameters */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run to which these parameters belong */,
  "seatbelts_on" INTEGER /* Indicator if seatbelts are used in the simulation (0 or 1) */,
  "env_width" REAL /* Width of the environment for the simulation */,
  "comm_radius" REAL /* Radius for communication between agents */,
  "initial_seed" INTEGER /* Initial random seed used in the simulation */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used in the simulation */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "agent_behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of agents (e.g., aggressive, passive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metrics */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run from which metrics are collected */,
  "sort_period" INTEGER /* Sorting period used in the simulation */,
  "repeat" INTEGER /* Number of times the simulation is repeated */,
  "agent_density" REAL /* Density of agents in the simulation */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during the simulation */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during the simulation */,
  "gpu_temperature" REAL /* Average GPU temperature during the simulation */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the simulation (e.g., frames per second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the runtime statistics */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run from which statistics are collected */,
  "s_rtc" REAL /* Time taken for real-time calculation */,
  "s_simulation" REAL /* Total simulation time */,
  "s_init" REAL /* Time taken to initialize the simulation */,
  "gpu_utilization" REAL /* GPU utilization percentage during the simulation */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* CPU utilization percentage during the simulation */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency during the simulation */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O operations during the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_statistics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
